DESCRIPTION: Sparkling red grape juice with a burst of effervescence, perfect for celebrations or everyday refreshment. Packed in a sleek oval bottle to preserve freshness and flavor.

DESCRIPTION: Peak Surge Fruit Punch Energy Drink, 32 oz recyclable bottle, designed for active lifestyles with electrolytes and rapid hydration support
中文描述: Peak Surge 果味 punch 运动饮料，32盎司可回收瓶装，专为活跃生活方式设计，含电解质并支持快速补水

DESCRIPTION: Refreshingly bold orange-flavored sports drink in a large 32 oz bottle, designed for sustained hydration during active lifestyles and post-workout recovery.
中文描述: 清爽浓郁的橙味运动饮料，32盎司大瓶装，专为积极生活方式和运动后补水设计。

DESCRIPTION: CitrusWave Lemon Lime Hydration Drink in a large 64 oz resealable bottle, ideal for active lifestyles and post-workout refreshment with balanced electrolytes and crisp citrus flavor.
中文描述: CitrusWave 柠檬青柠补水饮料，64盎司大容量可重复密封瓶装，适合积极生活方式和运动后补充水分，含有均衡电解质和清爽柑橘风味。

中文描述: CitrusFlow柠檬味补水饮料，64盎司可重复密封瓶装，将清新的柠檬与淡淡的甜味完美融合，带来顺滑解渴的体验，非常适合积极活跃的生活方式。

DESCRIPTION: A refreshing lemon-lime flavored hydration drink in a 32 oz resealable sports bottle, ideal for active lifestyles and on-the-go replenishment.
中文描述: 一款清爽的柠檬-青柠味补水饮料，采用32盎司可重复密封运动瓶装，适合活跃生活方式和外出时补充水分。

DESCRIPTION: Smooth and bold craft root beer with a rich herbal finish, delivered in a large 2-liter resealable bottle for lasting freshness and convenient serving.
中文描述: 口感顺滑、风味浓郁的手工根汁啤酒，带有醇厚的草本余韵，采用2升大容量可重复封口瓶装，保持持久新鲜，方便饮用。

DESCRIPTION: A bold, amber craft soda with deep roasted malt notes and a hint of caramel, delivered in a premium 2-liter glass bottle for superior freshness and presentation.
中文描述: 一款大胆的琥珀色手工苏打，带有浓郁的烘焙麦芽风味和淡淡的焦糖香气，采用高品质2升玻璃瓶装，保鲜更佳，外观精致。

DESCRIPTION: Maple Ridge Premium Ginger Ale, a smooth and crisp soft drink with a clean finish, available in a 2-liter recyclable bottle. Ideal for everyday refreshment or pairing with meals.
中文描述: 枫岭优质姜味汽水，口感顺滑清爽，收口干净，采用可回收2升瓶装，适合日常饮用或佐餐搭配。

DESCRIPTION: EverFrost premium tonic water, crafted with quinine from the Andes and a hint of citrus for a clean, crisp finish. Ideal for mixology or refreshing solo sipping, this still-chilled 1-liter bottle comes in recyclable packaging designed to preserve effervescence and flavor integrity.
中文描述: EverFrost优质汤力水，采用安第斯山脉的奎宁精心制作，并带有淡淡柑橘风味，口感清爽干净。适合调制鸡尾酒或单独畅饮，1升瓶装设计可保持气泡和风味稳定性，包装可回收。

DESCRIPTION: Iced tea beverage with a bold blend of black tea and citrus notes, delivered in convenient cans for on-the-go refreshment. Perfect for staying cool during active days or casual gatherings.
中文描述: 一款冰茶饮料，采用浓郁红茶与柑橘风味精心调配，罐装设计便于携带，适合日常饮用或休闲聚会时享用。

DESCRIPTION: Crisp and invigorating ginger ale with a clean, effervescent finish, perfect for mixing or enjoying chilled on its own.
中文描述: 清爽提神的姜汁汽水，气泡细腻顺滑，纯饮冰镇或调制饮品皆宜。

DESCRIPTION: Lightly carbonated diet tonic water with a crisp, clean finish, ideal for mixing or enjoying chilled. Packaged in a sleek glass bottle to preserve freshness and flavor.
中文描述: 轻度碳酸化的无糖汤力水，口感清爽干净，适合调制混合饮料或冰镇饮用。采用时尚玻璃瓶包装，保持新鲜与风味。

DESCRIPTION: A bold and crisp ginger ale crafted with natural botanicals, delivered in a 2-liter recyclable bottle for everyday refreshment at home or gatherings.
中文描述: 一款采用天然植物成分制成的浓烈而清新的姜味汽水，以2升可回收瓶装呈现，适合家庭饮用或聚会场合。

DESCRIPTION: Eco-friendly paper towels made from sustainably sourced bamboo fibers, offering strong absorbency and durability for everyday kitchen use. Individually wrapped for hygiene and convenience.
中文描述: 采用可持续来源的竹纤维制成的环保厨房纸巾，具有强效吸水性和耐用性，适合日常厨房使用。独立包装，卫生便捷。

DESCRIPTION: Extra-large premium paper towels crafted for superior absorbency and durability, ideal for quick cleanups and everyday kitchen use.
中文描述: 超大号优质纸巾，吸水性强，耐用可靠，适合快速清洁和日常厨房使用。

DESCRIPTION: Ultra-absorbent paper towels designed for heavy-duty cleanup, featuring a textured surface for superior grip and durability. Packaged in a compact roll for easy storage and dispensing.
中文描述: 超吸水性纸巾，专为强力清洁设计，表面带有纹理，具有卓越的抓握力和耐用性。采用紧凑卷装包装，便于存储和取用。

DESCRIPTION: Single-count decorative paper towel with elegant embossed pattern, ideal for formal settings and everyday elegance, made from soft yet durable cellulose fibers for reliable performance
中文描述: 单张装装饰性纸巾，带有优雅压花图案，适合正式场合和日常使用，采用柔软耐用的纤维素纤维制成，性能可靠

DESCRIPTION: Extra-large jumbo roll paper towels with a strong, quilted texture for superior absorbency and durability in high-demand households.
中文描述: 超大卷纸巾，采用加厚绗缝纹理，吸水性强，耐用耐磨，适合高使用频率的家庭环境。

DESCRIPTION: SunLuster Dish Liquid with Lemon Zest, 22 oz bottle offering powerful degreasing action for tough kitchen messes, featuring a refreshing citrus scent and gentle-on-hands formula ideal for daily dishwashing.
中文描述: SunLuster柠檬清香洗洁精，22盎司瓶装，有效去除顽固油渍，配方温和不伤手，清新的柑橘香气让日常洗碗更愉悦。

DESCRIPTION: OceanGleam Advanced Clean Liquid Dish Detergent with Sea Mineral Infusion, 22 oz bottle designed for tough grease removal while being gentle on hands
中文描述: OceanGleam海矿臻净液体洗洁精，22盎司瓶装，含海洋矿物精华，强效去油污且温和护手

DESCRIPTION: AquaBloom citrus-infused dish liquid detergent in a 12 oz recyclable bottle, delivering a fresh burst of cleanliness with every drop.
中文描述: AquaBloom柑橘精华洗洁精，12盎司可回收瓶装，每一滴都带来清新的洁净体验。

DESCRIPTION: ClearWave Giant Liquid Dish Detergent in refreshing citrus burst formula, 22 oz bottle designed for long-lasting use and powerful grease-cutting performance with every drop.
中文描述: ClearWave 巨人装液体洗洁精，清新柑橘香型配方，22盎司瓶装，持久耐用，每滴都能强力去除油渍。

DESCRIPTION: CitrusLift Lemon Fresh Dishwashing Liquid, 22 oz bottle with concentrated formula for tough grease, featuring natural lemon extract and a refreshing citrus scent that lasts through every wash.
中文描述: CitrusLift柠檬清新洗洁精，22盎司瓶装，浓缩配方可去除顽固油渍，含有天然柠檬提取物，持久散发清新的柑橘香气。

DESCRIPTION: SageStream dish liquid in a 22 oz bottle, featuring a plant-based formula with eucalyptus and green tea extracts for effective grease cutting and a naturally derived clean.
中文描述: SageStream 22盎司洗洁精，采用基于植物的配方，含有桉树和绿茶提取物，有效去除油脂，实现天然清洁。

DESCRIPTION: JoyStream Gentle Touch Liquid Dish Soap, 22 oz bottle with plant-infused formula for delicate handwashing and everyday dishes
中文描述: JoyStream 温和触感液体洗洁精，22盎司瓶装，含植物精华配方，适用于手洗精细餐具和日常碗碟清洁

DESCRIPTION: Individually wrapped fruit strips made with real fruit puree, offering a chewy and naturally sweet snack perfect for lunchboxes or on-the-go energy.
中文描述: 单份包装的果味条，采用真实果泥制成，口感有嚼劲且天然香甜，非常适合便当盒或外出时补充能量。

DESCRIPTION: Individually wrapped peppermint candies with a crisp outer shell and refreshing mint center, perfect for quick breath refreshment on the go.

DESCRIPTION: Mini chewy mint-flavored candy packs, perfect for on-the-go freshness and breath support. Individually sealed for convenience.

DESCRIPTION: Individually wrapped strawberry-flavored licorice twists, perfect for snacking and sharing, with a sweet fruity taste and soft chewy texture.
中文描述: 独立包装的草莓味甘草糖条，口感柔软有嚼劲，香甜可口，适合分享和日常零食。

DESCRIPTION: FrostBite Five Flavor Hard Candy Singles, individually wrapped for freshness, delivering a bold burst of fruit taste with every piece
中文描述: FrostBite五味硬糖独立包装，每颗都带来浓郁水果风味，保持新鲜口感

DESCRIPTION: A classic peanut butter cup candy bar with a crunchy chocolate coating and creamy center, individually wrapped for freshness and convenience.
中文描述: 经典的花生酱杯巧克力棒，外裹酥脆巧克力涂层，内含丝滑奶油夹心，独立包装，保持新鲜便捷。

DESCRIPTION: Savory beef and vegetable pot pie with flaky golden crust, made with slow-cooked tender beef and garden-fresh vegetables in a rich gravy, perfect for a comforting frozen dinner.
中文描述: 美味牛肉蔬菜派，配以酥脆金黄的外皮，采用慢炖嫩牛肉和新鲜园产蔬菜制成，搭配浓郁肉汁，是令人满足的冷冻晚餐之选。

DESCRIPTION: Golden baked French bread topped with premium shredded cheddar cheese, ready to heat and serve in minutes. Perfect for pairing with soups or enjoying as a savory side.
中文描述: 金黄烘烤的法式面包，撒上优质切达奶酪碎，加热即食，是搭配汤品或作为美味小食的理想选择。

DESCRIPTION: Michelina's classic linguini dish with rich tomato basil sauce, frozen for freshness and ready in minutes for a quick, satisfying meal.
中文描述: Michelina's 经典扁面条配浓郁番茄罗勒酱，冷冻保鲜，几分钟即可享用，快速又满足。

DESCRIPTION: Hearty whole grain spaghetti with slow-simmered marinara sauce, packed with garden vegetables and herbs, frozen for freshness in a resealable tray
中文描述: 富含全谷物的意大利面，搭配慢炖的马里纳拉酱，内含多种田园蔬菜和香草，冷冻保鲜，包装于可密封托盘中

DESCRIPTION: Hearty tomato basil pasta bake with al dente spaghetti and oven-roasted vegetables in a creamy ricotta blend, frozen for freshness
中文描述: 浓郁番茄罗勒意面烤菜，搭配弹牙意大利面和烤制蔬菜，混合丝滑乳清奶酪，冷冻锁鲜

DESCRIPTION: Savory apple-stuffed pastry pockets with a flaky crust, baked to golden perfection and ideal for a quick frozen meal.
中文描述: 香脆外皮包裹美味苹果馅料的咸味酥饼，烘烤至金黄酥脆，是便捷速食的理想之选。

DESCRIPTION: Savory turkey and vegetable filling encased in a flaky, buttery pastry crust, ready in minutes for a satisfying frozen meal experience.
中文描述: 美味的火鸡和蔬菜馅料包裹在酥脆黄油酥皮中，几分钟即可享用，带来满足的冷冻餐体验。

DESCRIPTION: Savory oriental-style beef slices in a rich soy glaze, ready-to-heat meal perfect for quick dinners
中文描述: 美味的东方风味牛肉片，搭配浓郁酱油酱汁，即热即食，适合快速晚餐

DESCRIPTION: Savory chicken and vegetable filling in a crisp, oven-baked pastry shell, ready in minutes for a satisfying meal.
中文描述: 香浓鸡肉蔬菜馅料搭配酥脆烘烤外皮，几分钟即可享用的美味餐点。

DESCRIPTION: A hearty variety pack of instant oatmeal cups, offering a range of classic and fruit-infused flavors in convenient single-serve packaging for quick breakfast or snack occasions.
中文描述: 一款丰盛的即食燕麦杯组合装，包含多种经典和水果风味，采用方便的单人份包装，适合快速早餐或零食场合。

DESCRIPTION: Smooth and creamy instant oatmeal in a convenient single-serve cup, featuring ripe apples blended with a hint of cinnamon for a warm, comforting breakfast experience.
中文描述: 顺滑细腻的即食燕麦片，单人份杯装，搭配熟透苹果与淡淡肉桂风味，带来温暖舒适的早餐体验。

DESCRIPTION: Premium stone-ground old-fashioned oatmeal in a resealable bag, perfect for a warm, wholesome breakfast with a rich, nutty flavor and hearty texture
中文描述: 优质石磨传统燕麦片，采用可重复封口袋包装，适合温暖丰盛的早餐，具有浓郁的坚果风味和扎实口感

DESCRIPTION: Premium quick-cook oatmeal in a resealable 18 oz pouch, made from whole grain oats for a wholesome breakfast ready in minutes.
中文描述: 优质速食燕麦片，18盎司可密封袋装，采用全谷物燕麦制成，几分钟即可享用营养早餐。

DESCRIPTION: Wholesome honey-flavored instant oatmeal in a convenient resealable pouch, perfect for quick breakfasts on busy mornings.
中文描述: 美味蜂蜜味即食燕麦片，采用可重复密封袋包装，适合忙碌早晨的快速早餐。

DESCRIPTION: Eco-friendly fabric softener refill in a concentrated formula, designed to reduce plastic waste and provide long-lasting freshness for everyday laundry needs.
中文描述: 环保型织物柔顺剂补充装，采用浓缩配方，减少塑料浪费，为日常洗衣提供持久清新体验。

DESCRIPTION: Long-lasting fabric softener with natural lavender essence, available in a recyclable 22 oz bottle for easy dispensing and reduced environmental impact.
中文描述: 持久留香织物柔顺剂，含天然薰衣草精华，采用可回收22盎司瓶装，方便倾倒且更环保。

DESCRIPTION: Long-lasting fabric softener sheets infused with calming chamomile and aloe, designed to reduce static and add lasting softness in every dryer cycle.
中文描述: 持久留香织物柔顺纸，蕴含舒缓洋甘菊和芦荟精华，有效减少静电，让衣物每次烘干后都柔软顺滑。

DESCRIPTION: Ultra-concentrated fabric softener liquid with tropical mango and bamboo essence, designed for high-efficiency machines and available in a recyclable 20 oz bottle with resealable cap. Provides long-lasting freshness and reduces static cling in one wash.
中文描述: 超浓缩织物柔顺剂液体，带有热带芒果和竹子精华，专为高效洗衣机设计，采用可回收20盎司瓶装，带可重复密封瓶盖。一次洗涤即可提供持久清香并减少静电。

DESCRIPTION: Lightly scented fabric softener sheets for everyday freshness, designed to reduce static and soften fabrics naturally with a gentle eucalyptus breeze aroma
中文描述: 带有淡淡香味的织物柔顺纸，专为日常清新设计，可有效减少静电，天然柔顺衣物，散发清新的桉树清香

DESCRIPTION: Luxurious fabric softener in liquid form, featuring a delicate jasmine bloom scent that infuses deep softness and silkiness into every fiber. Packaged in a recyclable 64 oz bottle with precise pour spout for easy use. Ideal for weekly laundry routines, leaving clothes gently fragranced and noticeably smoother.
中文描述: 奢华液体织物柔顺剂，带有淡雅的茉莉花香，为每根纤维注入柔软与丝滑。采用可回收64盎司瓶装，配有精准倾倒口，方便使用。适合每周洗衣时使用，让衣物柔软顺滑，留有淡淡清香。

DESCRIPTION: MorningRidge Variety Pack of Crunchy Breakfast Cereals in Assorted Flavors, Perfect for a Wholesome Start to Your Day
中文描述: MorningRidge混合口味酥脆早餐麦片组合装，多种风味，为您的早晨提供营养开始

DESCRIPTION: A vibrant mix of fun-shaped, fruit-flavored cereal pieces designed for kids' enjoyment and morning excitement, packed in a resealable stand-up pouch to keep every bite crisp.
中文描述: 专为儿童设计的多彩水果味趣味造型麦片，带来早晨的欢乐与活力，采用可重复封口直立袋包装，保持每一口酥脆。

DESCRIPTION: Light and airy puffed cereal made with whole grains for a wholesome, crunchy start to your day.
中文描述: 轻盈蓬松的谷物膨化麦片，采用全谷物制成，带来健康酥脆的早晨体验。

DESCRIPTION: Iconic crispy wheat cereal with a golden crunch, perfect for starting your day with energy and served with milk or enjoyed straight from the box.
中文描述: 经典酥脆小麦麦片，呈金黄色松脆口感，是开启活力一天的理想选择，可搭配牛奶食用或直接享用。

DESCRIPTION: Wholesome raisin bran cereal made from hand-picked plump raisins and hearty bran flakes, offering a balanced blend of natural sweetness and fiber-rich texture in every spoonful. Packaged in a resealable carton to maintain freshness.
中文描述: 由精选饱满葡萄干和浓郁麦麸片制成的全谷物葡萄干麦片，每一口都融合了天然甜味与丰富的膳食纤维质感。采用可重复密封纸盒包装，持久保鲜。

DESCRIPTION: FieldRise crispy wheat breakfast cereal offers a satisfying crunch with every bite, made from premium whole grain wheat and lightly sweetened for balanced morning energy. Packaged in a resealable freshness bag to maintain crispness.
